description: Named recall scoring profiles for lorekeep. These are v0 implementation constants, not tuned truth; calibration happens after dogfooding.
formula: base = fts_score*w.fts_score + tag_match*w.tag_match + subject_match*w.subject_match + canon_level_modifier*w.canon_level_modifier + recency_modifier*w.recency_modifier + scope_match*w.scope_match + tag_boost*w.tag_boost; score = base * w.excluded_subject_penalty when the entry references an excluded subject, else base. Each factor input is normalized to [0,1] at runtime; canon_level_modifier and entry_status_modifier read from canon_level_scores and entry_status_scores below. This is a weighted-sum-then-penalty model (per docs/01-lore-service-design.md), deliberately distinct from den-memory's additive-modifier model — RP recall tunes per-factor emphasis by profile rather than summing fixed authority modifiers.

narrative-default.description: Balanced weighting for general RP scenes.

lore-heavy.description: Favors comprehensive lore retrieval for lore-dense campaigns.

character-focused.description: Favors character-specific entries over world-level lore.
